title: helichrysum monticola
intro: Helichrysum monticola, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, is native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum monticola include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum monticola is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve skin health, and promote overall well-being.
